ddls:
CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "registered_name" TEXT /* Official registered name of the horse */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the horse */,
  "breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Sex of the horse (e.g., male, female) */,
  "sire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sire (father) of the horse */,
  "dam_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dam (mother) of the horse */,
  "coat_color" TEXT /* Coat color of the horse */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the horse in hands */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the horse in pounds */,
  "microchip_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the horse's microchip */,
  "veterinarian_id" INTEGER /* ID of the veterinarian who regularly treats the horse */,
  "diet_plan" TEXT /* Details of the horse's diet */,
  "training_plan" TEXT /* Details of the horse's training plan */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Current health status of the horse */,
  "retirement_date" TEXT /* Date when the horse was retired */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the horse's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_sire_id FOREIGN KEY ("sire_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_dam_id FOREIGN KEY ("dam_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jockey */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the jockey */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date the jockey started their career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date the jockey ended their career */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the jockey */,
  "total_races" INTEGER /* Total number of races participated in by the jockey */,
  "weight" REAL /* Current weight of the jockey */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the jockey */,
  "injury_history" TEXT /* History of injuries */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Level of experience (e.g., novice, intermediate, professional) */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the jockey's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "birth_date" TEXT /* Birth date of the trainer */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the trainer */,
  "career_start_date" TEXT /* Date the trainer started their career */,
  "career_end_date" TEXT /* Date the trainer ended their career */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total number of wins by the trainer */,
  "total_horses_trained" INTEGER /* Total number of horses trained by the trainer */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Area of specialty (e.g., sprint, endurance) */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the trainer */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the trainer's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the owner */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* URL to the owner's website */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* Links to the owner's social media profiles */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the owner's photo */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date of the race */,
  "race_location" TEXT /* Location of the race */,
  "race_distance" REAL /* Distance of the race in furlongs */,
  "race_prize" REAL /* Prize money for the race */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of race (e.g., flat, steeplechase) */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track (e.g., good, soft) */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race is held */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the race */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "position" INTEGER /* Final position of the horse in the race */,
  "time" REAL /* Time taken by the horse to complete the race */,
  "odds" REAL /* Odds of the horse winning */,
  "betting_pool" REAL /* Total amount in the betting pool for the race */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL to a photo of the race result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horse_ownership" (
  "ownership_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ownership record */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the ownership ended */,
  "reason_for_change" TEXT /* Reason for the ownership change */,
  "price_paid" REAL /* Amount paid for the horse */,
  "sale_location" TEXT /* Location where the sale took place */,
  "sale_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the sale */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ownership_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_ownership_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horse_ownership_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., official records, external analysis) */,
  "metric_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the metric */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical data record */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity (e.g., horse, jockey, trainer, owner) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity */,
  "data_key" TEXT /* Key of the data field */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data field */,
  "data_date" TEXT /* Date the data was recorded */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the historical data (e.g., official records, user input) */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the historical data */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, public viewer) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Status of the user account (active or inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of entity accessed (e.g., horse, jockey, trainer, owner, race, result) */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the entity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's device */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES race_results ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduled race */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "scheduled_date" TEXT /* Date the race is scheduled */,
  "scheduled_time" TEXT /* Time the race is scheduled */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled race (e.g., planned, cancelled, rescheduled) */,
  "track_id" INTEGER /* ID of the track where the race is scheduled */,
  "track_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the track at the time of scheduling */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather conditions at the time of scheduling */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_schedules_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)
